summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements including Internet Identity login, multi-account management, transaction system, category management, budget management, analysis/reports screen, settings screen, bottom navigation, and visual design. However, several specific acceptance criteria cannot be confirmed due to file truncation, and some files were omitted from the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Line graph for spending trend over time in the Analysis & Reports screen
missing_requirements.reason: The AnalysisPage file was omitted from the diff summary (listed as one of 19 omitted files). There is no evidence of a line graph component being implemented anywhere in the visible diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Language toggle between English and Hindi with persistence across sessions
missing_requirements.reason: SettingsContext.tsx shows language stored from backend settings, but the SettingsPage file is omitted. There is no evidence of a language toggle UI or any i18n/translation mechanism for Hindi language strings in the visible diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Profile setup modal that prompts user for a name on first login
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention any user profile or name setup flow. ProfileSetupModal.tsx adds a name-entry step not specified in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Access control and admin token initialization via _initializeAccessControlWithSecret
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention any admin token or access control system beyond principal-scoped data isolation. The useActor hook calls an admin token initialization method and the backend imports MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules not requested.
